km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស
km.England, United Kingdom: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, អូនីតេដគីងដូម

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Bunne於1340年出生在英國時，他的父親John Bunn30歲，母親Mary30歲。他和Hannah至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Bunne于1340年出生在英国时，他的父亲John Bunn30岁，母亲Mary30岁。他和Hannah至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Bunne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly a nickname for someone with a prominent lump or swelling, from Old French bugne, beugne ‘swelling’.
habitational name from Bunny (Nottinghamshire), from Old English būne ‘reed’ + ēg ‘island’.

variants.name: Boney
meanings: English: variant of Bunney . If originating from Sussex, the name may also be a variant of Bone in which the final weakly stressed -e has been pronounced [ɪ] or [i].
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English boni ‘bony, big-boned’.
German: shortened form of Böning (see Boening ) or of its rare cognate Boning. This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Bonney
meanings: English (Lancashire): nickname for a handsome person, especially a large or well-built one, from northern dialect bonnie ‘fine, beautiful’ (still in common use in northern England and Scotland).
German: variant of   Boney  . This surname is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Bunne was born in 1340, in England, his father, John Bunn, was 30 and his mother, Mary, was 30. He had at least 1 son with Hannah.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Bunne est né en 1340, à Angleterre, son père, John Bunn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Hannah.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Bunne 1340 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Bunn 30 und seine Mutter Mary 30. Er hatte mit Hannah mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Bunne è nato il nel 1340 nel England, il suo padre, John Bunn, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Hannah.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bunneが1340年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Bunnは30歳，母Maryは30歳であった。彼はHannahとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Bunne(이)가 1340년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bunn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Hannah(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Bunne nasceu em 1340, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bunn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Hannah.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Bunne родился в 1340 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Bunn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Hannah.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Bunne nació en 1340, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Bunn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Hannah.
